elements.label: Evidence of Distinction Dials
elements.description: Using the SDMo distinctions, identify the elements of the conversation as they appear by marking the knobs below. Distinctions are available in the other page

elements.label: Evidence of Inquiry
elements.description: Did you observe evidence of the items of inquiry? Choose below.

elements.label: SDM Occurrence
elements.description: Using your annotations, answer the following question: Did Shared Decision Making occur in this conversation? Please choose a number below.
